text: 9" flat length 3910900057 1.8mm XBraid TT, white/black, suture tape, 9" flat, non-needled, 40" suture 3910900058 1.8mm XBraid TT, white/blue, suture tape, MO-6 (taper, 1/2c, 26mm), 40" suture 3910900059 1.8mm XBraid TT, white/black, suture tape, MO-6 (taper, 1/2c, 26mm), 40" suture 3910900069 1.8mm XBraid TT, black/white, suture tape, da ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 40" suture 3910900018 2.0mm XBraid TT, violet co-braid, 100% UHMWPE 3910900019 2.0mm XBraid TT, violet, 100% UHMWPE 3910900007 2.2mm XBraid TT, white/blue, suture tape, CTX (taper, 1/2c, 48mm), 40" suture 3910900008 2.2mm XBraid TT, white/black, suture tape, MO-6 (taper, 1/2c, 26mm), 40" suture 3910900015 2.2mm XBraid TT, white/blue, suture tape, MO-6 (taper, 1/2c, 26mm), 40" suture 3910900016 2.2mm XBraid TT, white/black, suture tape, CTX (taper, 1/2c, 48mm), 40" suture 3910900144 Double pack, 2.2mm XBraid TT, white/black, suture tape, non-needled, 40" suture; 2.2mm XBraid TT, black, suture tape, non-needled, 40" suture The XBraid S Suture line offers high-strength, round sutures in various sizes and colors. Sutures are composed of 100% ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene and designed to increase tendon-to-bone contact in soft tissue repairs. Features and benefits • Designed with lubricity in mind, XBraid S easily slides after anchor insertion and during knot tying. • Easy to open packaging designed to help with efficiency in the operating room.
